description: Forward-compatibility smoke fixture for ZH-EN loanword loaders. Mirrors the canonical zh_en_loanword.json (version=1) but bumps the schema to 2 and adds synthetic unknown fields. Each runtime loader must silently ignore unknown fields and still produce a usable dictionary. Generated by scripts/check_loanword_forward_compat.py — do not edit by hand.

metadata.schema: Mirror of canonical schema with deliberate forward-compat fields
metadata.lookup_priority: case-sensitive loanwords -> uppercase acronyms -> letter_fallback (char by char on uppercased text)
